title: Baked
description: A mod that adds basic baked foods to MineCraft (WIP)
body: **This mod requires Fabric API to be used on the Fabric Launcher** # Baked Just a basic food mod that adds baked goods. ### Current Items - Apple Pie - Sweet Berry Pie - Baked Apples (The Mascot) - Honey Candy ### Future Plans - Blueberries - Blueberry Pie - Warm Milk - Wooden Mugs #### If you want to add translations You can make a pull request or DM me on discord (KingAchakè#5112)
